outlook_paragraph: CRGY shows moderate drilling activity with 12 active sites at decision date, 2.2 above the recent average, driven by two newly active pads. With only 20% exposure to the current segment and a realized price at a discount to WTI, revenue is constrained despite stable oil prices around $68.74/bbl. The deterministic forecast of $490.4M reflects this limited segment footprint and modest production growth signal from satellite data.
